en: Do they know I exist? Uh, yeah. I've mentioned something like you, but nothing very specific.
ko: 그들이 내가 존재하는 걸 아는 걸까?

en: Um, oh, yeah, they're quite conservative, so maybe not those pants.
ko: 음, 아, 그래, 그들은 꽤 보수적이야.

en: Um... Did you just, um, stall them? Stall them?
ko: 방금, 음, 시간을 끌었어? 시간을 끌었어?

en: Sorry, they don't like waiting. Um, do I live here?
Uh, definitely not. Um, are we having sex?
Uh, yeah, but not oral. I wasn't gonna mention oral.
ko: 어, 응, 하지만 구강 성교는 아니야.

en: Okay, good. Don't. How did you think that was gonna come up?
Could you help me with this, please? I don't know. If it does, just deny it completely.
ko: 잘 모르겠어, 만약 나온다면 완전히 부인해.

en: But who's gonna bring it up? Your dad? Tim?
ko: 누가 그걸 꺼낼 건데? 네 아빠?

en: Had any cunnilingus with my daughter recently? Well, you never know.
Yeah. They're there. Yeah. Oh, they are. Yeah, right behind you.
